title: Mabor 8Pcs Rubber Grippers for Opening Jars Round Square Bottle Lid Opener Gripper for Arthritic Weak Hands Rubber Jar Can Opener Gripper Pad for Women Olds
description:
About this item
Exquisite Design: The rubber grippers for opening jars are suitable for most jars and bottles, with a textured surface that can generate more friction with the lid of the jar, providing excellent grip to open stubborn jars and containers of various sizes
Convenient to Use and Easy to Clean: Simply place the rubber bottle opener on the lid and rotate the lid, as usual, to easily unscrew it. Very suitable for children, the elderly, and those with weak hands. Small size, lightweight, easy to carry, and convenient to use during travel. The surface of the rubber can opener is smooth and doesn't have any residue. Simply rinse with water or gently brush (do not rub with steel wire to avoid damaging the surface structure)
Wide Application: Not only can the jar lid gripper pads serve as a bottle opener to open the lid of bean cans, beverage bottles, and sealed containers, but they can also serve as a kitchen coaster, insulated coaster, or anti-scald handle pad to avoid scalding your hands. It is also a good home decoration that can add some bright colors to the kitchen
Rubber Grippers for Opening Jars: The round and square bottle openers are made of rubber with a soft texture, which is non slip, moisture-proof, heat insulating, tear resistant, and robust. The rubber material and texture design make it perfectly slip resistant
Size and Component: You will receive 8 pieces bottle openers in 2 different shapes, with a circular size of approximately 4.92 x 4.92 x 0.02 inches and a square size of approximately 5.04 x 5.04 x 0.03 inches, very suitable for adding a touch of brightness and beauty to your home and kitchen
reviews_5s: They are so helpful, durable, love the color. Makes things so easy to open it grips so easy definitely value for your moneyNice setThey arrived very quickly and work really well and very easy to use.
